description: Implement Step Functions state machine with Polly integration and EventBridge wiring using strict TDD. Write failing tests first, then implement the minimal CDK code to make them pass. The state machine should be triggered by the EventBridge rule (replacing the placeholder Lambda) and contain a Polly StartSpeechSynthesisTask state.
steps: Step 1 - Write failing tests in test/cdk-base.test.ts (TDD red phase). Add a new describe block 'Step Functions State Machine' with tests that verify: (a) A state machine resource exists (AWS::StepFunctions::StateMachine), (b) The state machine definition contains a Polly task state (check DefinitionString for polly:StartSpeechSynthesisTask or similar), (c) The state machine has CloudWatch Logs logging enabled (LoggingConfiguration with level ALL), (d) The state machine execution role has least-privilege IAM permissions for Polly (polly:StartSpeechSynthesisTask) and S3 output bucket (s3:PutObject). Also update the existing EventBridge tests: (e) The EventBridge rule target now targets the state machine (AWS::StepFunctions::StateMachine ARN) instead of the Lambda, (f) Verify RoleArn is set on the EventBridge target (needed for Step Functions targets). Remove the test asserting the placeholder Lambda target exists. Remove the 'has a target configured' test that checks for a generic Arn.
Step 2 - Run `npm test` to confirm the new tests fail (TDD red phase confirmed).

Step 3 - Implement the state machine in lib/cdk-base-stack.ts (TDD green phase). Add imports for aws-cdk-lib/aws-stepfunctions, aws-cdk-lib/aws-stepfunctions-tasks, aws-cdk-lib/aws-logs, and aws-cdk-lib/aws-iam. Create a CloudWatch LogGroup for the state machine. Define the state machine with: (a) A CallAwsService task or StepFunctionsStartSpeechSynthesisTask that invokes Polly StartSpeechSynthesisTask with placeholder parameters (Text: use JsonPath from input or placeholder, VoiceId: 'Joanna', OutputFormat: 'mp3', OutputS3BucketName: reference to the output bucket). (b) Chain: Start -> Polly Task -> Succeed state. (c) Enable logging to the CloudWatch LogGroup with level ALL. (d) Assign the state machine a role with least-privilege permissions: polly:StartSpeechSynthesisTask action and s3:PutObject on the output bucket.

Step 4 - Update the EventBridge rule target. Remove the placeholder Lambda and its target. Replace with: rule.addTarget(new targets.SfnStateMachine(stateMachine)) which will pass the event as input. Import aws-cdk-lib/aws-events-targets SfnStateMachine.
Step 5 - Run `npm test` to confirm all tests pass (TDD green phase). Update the snapshot by running `npm test -- -u` if the snapshot test fails due to expected changes.
Step 6 - Run `npx cdk synth` to confirm the template synthesizes cleanly.
acceptance_criteria: AWS::StepFunctions::StateMachine resource exists in the synthesized template
State machine definition references polly:startSpeechSynthesisTask (CallAwsService pattern)
State machine has LoggingConfiguration with level ALL and a CloudWatch LogGroup destination
State machine execution role has IAM policy with polly:StartSpeechSynthesisTask and s3:PutObject permissions
EventBridge rule target references the state machine ARN (not the placeholder Lambda)
EventBridge target has a RoleArn for invoking the state machine
The placeholder Lambda is removed from the stack
verification: npm test passes all tests including the new Step Functions assertions
npx cdk synth produces a valid CloudFormation template
